programmes.show_name: Get It On with Bryan Burnett
programmes.show_description: It's the songs about dance styles, whether there's some jive talking or a tango in the night - songs that had us twisting by the pool or having a go at a hucklebuck.
A preview of some of the acts coming to Scotland for the three-day country music festival. Plus a reminder of some of the highlights from previous years.
The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.

programmes.show_name: Get It On with Bryan Burnett
programmes.show_description: Thirty-five years ago, The Clash's Should I Stay or Should I Go was reissued after it was used in a jeans commercial. Which other songs reached fresh ears after appearing on an ad?
Live sessions and archive performances from Pacific Quay alongside news of upcoming gigs and festivals with upfront releases and classic tracks from some of your favourite artists.
